nasb.text: He has filled them with skill to perform every work of an engraver and of a designer and of an embroiderer, in blue and in purple and in scarlet material, and in fine linen, and of a weaver, as performers of every work and makers of designs.

esv.text: He has filled them with skill to do every sort of work done by an engraver or by a designer or by an embroiderer in blue and purple and scarlet yarns and fine twined linen, or by a weaver—by any sort of workman or skilled designer.

cnv.text: 耶和華又用智慧充滿他們的心，使他們能作各種工作，雕刻的工，設圖案的工，用藍色紫色朱紅色線和細麻刺繡的工，以及編織的工。他們能作各種工程，也能巧設圖案。”

ccb.text: 耶和华使他们成为能工巧匠，精通各样技艺，包括雕刻、图案设计、纺织以及用细麻线和蓝色、紫色、朱红色的线刺绣。”
